text: The category of celestial bodies and the category of planets are mutually exclusive. Not a single planet is a star. It must be the case that a portion of stars are not celestial bodies.

premise1.subject: planet
premise1.raw_text: The category of celestial bodies and the category of planets are mutually exclusive.

premise2.subject: planet
premise2.raw_text: Not a single planet is a star.

conclusion.subject: star
conclusion.raw_text: It must be the case that a portion of stars are not celestial bodies.

validity_details.reason: Two negative premises (Fallacy of Exclusive Premises)
